Hey everyone, in this video I'm going to show you how you can get your leads to schedule an appointment before you ever even talk to them. So what we're going to do is put our acuity scheduling into ClickFunnels. So that way as soon as they get to that thank you page in ClickFunnels, they're able to schedule an appointment right away. So you need your acuity setup already, we covered that in a previous video. You need your ClickFunnels for ad setup, we cover how to import one in previous videos. Go ahead to acuity and if you already have a calendar and appointment type that you want, you can skip this part. I'm going to show you how to do it from the start. So once you're at acuity, you've logged in, you want to hit business settings on the left. It takes us right to availability and calendars. I'm going to go ahead and hit this green add new calendar button. We're going to go ahead and call this 42-day detox. Let's go ahead and give it a picture. I'm going to go and choose this picture. That's our gym logo. Make sure you choose your location and your time zone should be set as part of that initial setup. Now if you want to be able to do more than one appointment at a time, you need to change this allow appointments to be scheduled on time slot. So if you set for three for instance, that means up to three people can book the same time and it still leaves it open as a time they can choose. Set that to whatever you want. Once that looks good, go ahead and hit the screen create calendar button. It's going to have you schedule your hours. We covered this in the acuity setup video, but just a brief review. If you have the same regular hours over and over, you want to use regular weekly hours. That's going to be the easiest way. So for instance, you don't like to do any appointments on Monday or Tuesday. I'm going to click in there, delete everything, and click away and it'll change it to closed. Say Sundays, you do it from 8 a.m. to 3 p.m., but you need a break and then you start from 5 p.m. to 9 p.m. Then once I click away, it automatically formats out just like we want it to be. Once you've got your regular hours set, you can hit the save regular hours button, that green button right there. It's going to save those hours and when you scroll down, it's going to show you all of your available times and you can go through different months. So say for instance on the 17th, you know you're going to be unavailable. You can click in there and delete the text, hit set hours, and then you're closed for just that day, but the schedule is still intact. It's probably the best way to do it. You can also untick this regular hours box and you can set it day by day by day, but if you're running ads and you're not checking all the time, you could end up running into an issue where there are no appointments for them to schedule and that can be frustrating. So that's why regular weekly hours is normally the best option. Now that we have our calendar set up and we have a regular weekly hour set up, let's go to appointment types. So it's over here on the left in the QT. I'm going to click new type of service. That's that green button at the top. Now this is going to be something that your clients are able to see. So make sure that you're comfortable with them seeing what the name of this appointment is. Change the duration to however long it takes. 30 minutes is normally what we recommend, but if you need longer, shorter, you can change it there. If you want to make sure you have prep time before, you can click this block off and say for instance, you want 15 minutes before you can put in 15 minutes and that's also going to block up the 15 minutes before that appointment so nobody can schedule in that time slot. That's up to you. You can always change it back to zero if you don't want any extra time book there. You don't need to worry about category. If you have a picture for the challenge that they're signing up for your gym that you really like, you can choose a picture and add it. Access, you want to make sure that that's set to public. And then under calendars, make sure you choose the calendar that you want associated with this appointment that you just created that you already have existing. Now that we have that check mark there, I'm going to go and hit this green appointment type button. And it went ahead and successfully created that appointment type. So now we need to get the special code that we're going to put into our click model so clients can schedule on their own. So on the left in a QT, go to the right and click on client scheduling page. You want to scroll down and here where it says general scheduling page or whatever happens to say click on that. You want to scroll down and find your appointment and when you just created. So there's our new orientation, the one we just created. And then we want to go and choose embed scheduler that green there. This is the code that we're going to use. So go ahead and hit that copy button. It'll let you know it copied it to your clipboard. Now if you're tracking this on a tracking dock, go to that tracking dock and paste that code in there. That way you have it for later on you know which one you used. So while this is still copied to my clipboard, I'm going to head to click funnels. Log in if you need to, open up the funnel that you want to put this into your cold traffic funnel. I'm going to click on the second page, the thank you page right there on the left. Then there's the preview of the page. I'm going to click this edit page button right there. It's going to load up the page editor and you want to look for this custom JavaScript slash HTML. When you click on that, it's going to open the side bar and you want to click on open code editor, that blue button. So it has a spot where we can type. I'm going to click in there and I'm going to paste. So that's control V on a Windows computer or command V on a Mac. And once you do that, you should see the exact same code from acuity inside of that box. And that's exactly what you want to see. Go ahead and hit the X and then save it. I always recommend saving twice for good measure and then hit preview. It's going to load this up just like your clients would see. And now they're able to choose that appointment. They can change their time zone if they need to, but it should be the same as yours. And they can see all of the available appointments that they can schedule right away. Once they pick that, they can hit continue. They can put in their name. And that confirms that appointment right there. And once that's done, you can go to your acuity and go to appointments. I'm going to change it to week view so I can see all the appointments. And there's our new appointment right there. So that's how your clients are able to schedule an appointment with you based on your availability without ever even talking to you yet. Hope you enjoyed this video and hope you enjoy the rest.
